name: Header Enrichment
description: Include county, state, and effective date in the header, e.g., 'County: Miami-Dade | State: Florida | Effective Date: February 28, 2026'

name: Section Organization
description: Organize content into labeled sections (e.g., LIENS & ENCUMBRANCES, TAX STATUS, OWNERSHIP, OTHER MATTERS, REVIEWER NOTES) for clarity

name: Instrument Number Inclusion
description: Include instrument numbers and recording details for every lien, e.g., 'Instrument No.: 2021-0123456 | Recorded: February 15, 2021'

name: Lien Position Context
description: Provide lien position context, such as 'First Mortgage', and status, like 'ASSIGNED', for each lien

name: Action Flagging
description: Flag items requiring action with 'ACTION REQUIRED', e.g., 'ACTION REQUIRED: Evaluate whether HOA must be named as party defendant in foreclosure complaint'

name: Tax Status Highlighting
description: Separate tax information into its own section and highlight delinquency status, e.g., '2025 Taxes: DELINQUENT — $8,247.00'

name: Reviewer Notes Section
description: Include a reviewer notes section with actionable items for the attorney to address, e.g., 'Delinquent 2025 taxes must be addressed before sale'

name: Chain of Title Clarification
description: Include satisfaction of prior mortgages to show a clean chain of title, e.g., 'Santos mortgage fully satisfied prior to conveyance (Instrument 2015-0567890)'

name: Evidence Linking
description: Cross-reference external evidence, such as emails or documents, to support claims, e.g., 'Cross-referenced the servicing transfer from the servicer email'

name: Specificity Over Generics
description: Use specific numbers, dates, and instrument IDs instead of generic text, e.g., '$445,000.00' instead of 'a significant amount'

name: Metadata Inclusion
description: Include relevant metadata, such as tax parcel numbers and special assessments, e.g., 'Tax Parcel: 33-5022-014-0290 | Special Assessment: $1,200.00/year'

name: Clear Ownership
description: Clearly state current vesting and prior ownership, including conveyance methods, e.g., 'Current Vesting: Carlos A. Rodriguez, a single man (fee simple)'

name: Use Standard Headers
description: Use ### for section headers and ## for subsections, not plain text, to maintain consistency throughout the document

name: Include Metadata
description: Add document preparation date, court details, judge name, and case number from court order in the introduction section

name: Prioritize Action Items
description: Replace flat list of developments with prioritized ACTION ITEMS ranked by urgency (e.g., URGENT, HIGH, NORMAL) for easy reference

name: Specify Servicer Details
description: Provide servicer contact information, including name, address, and effective transfer date, to ensure correct correspondence

name: Link Deadlines to Actions
description: Make deadlines actionable by specifying what needs to happen by each date, rather than just listing the dates

name: Cross-Reference Documents
description: Connect information across all relevant documents (e.g., title search, email, court order) into a unified picture to avoid inconsistencies

name: Use Concrete Numbers
description: Use specific numbers and amounts (e.g., $487,920.00, April 1, 2026) instead of generic text to ensure accuracy and clarity

name: Organize Sections Logically
description: Order sections in a logical manner, such as introduction, action items, deadlines, and notes, to facilitate easy reading and reference

name: Highlight Title Concerns
description: Create a dedicated section for title concerns, including specific details (e.g., delinquent taxes, lien issues) to ensure these critical issues are addressed

name: Include Evidence Links
description: Provide source citations with document names and chunk numbers (e.g., 'servicer email: $487,920.00 as of 3/1/2026') to support claims and facilitate verification
